description: Implement FGAP-125's remaining two legs under FEAT-014, per enacted DEC-0022 (acting agents dispatch as pi subprocesses): (1) inject wo.context_blocks into the dispatched pi subprocess -- resolve the referenced blocks and pass them into the agent's context across the process boundary; (2) validate the agent's returned output against wo.output_contract post-return -- the subprocess must emit structured output the loop can check. Each leg gets a per-field regression pin, matching the existing pattern for clampToScope and validateWorkOrderInput (already implemented with unit pins).
acceptance_criteria: wo.context_blocks is resolved and injected into the dispatched pi subprocess's context across the process boundary, with a unit pin demonstrating a work-order carrying context_blocks actually receives that context in the subprocess
the agent's returned output is validated against wo.output_contract post-return, with a unit pin demonstrating a non-conforming output is caught and a conforming one passes
context_blocks and output_contract each move from zero-references to consumed, closing the schema-contract-ahead-of-engine gap FGAP-125 describes
existing clampToScope and validateWorkOrderInput behavior unchanged (regression)
build, check, and full test suite exit 0
